deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'n=1; until npx prisma migrate deploy; do if [ $n -ge 6 ]; then echo "FATAL: prisma migrate deploy gagal setelah 6 percobaan. P1001=DB tak terjangkau (pastikan service app & Postgres di PROJECT + ENVIRONMENT yang sama — nama *.railway.internal hanya terdaftar di DNS privat environment tempat Postgres benar-benar berjalan). P1012=env DATABASE_URL belum diset di service ini."; exit 1; fi; echo "migrate deploy gagal — percobaan $n/6, ulang dalam 5s"; n=$((n+1)); sleep 5; done; echo "[start] Next.js listen di 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-3000}"; exec npx next start -H 0.0.0.0 -p ${PORT:-3000}'
